title: Invalid value for email column (update multiple column values)

Hey,

posts.author: alexburley (Alex)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I am using the API to create a new column of email type. This correctly creates a column with email value and some display text. However, when I use the update multiple columns mutation I get an invalid value exception.

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @alexburley
can you please paste here the mutation text that you used (the one with change_multiple_column_values).
this can help us better understand the problem
